title: CTV
description: A texture pack based arround the vanilla game made for 1.8.9 PVP
body:
CTV [16x] is a texture pack based arround one of the first pack i've made that is themed arround the vanilla game.


It is made for 1.8.9 pvp gamemodes and features short and slanted swords for better readability but can be used how ever you like.


It also includes 4 fully custom skies made for the pack, those only works with optifine ! (if you don't use optifine, the pack will still work fine, don't worry)


Here are some in game screenshots to showcase the pack :


![CTV - #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/791620c5712f3409150fb70b205c806fcfaab640.jpeg)

![CTV - #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cab1d5438f66e439aa168ccca6b21ad382cbd1a.jpeg)

![CTV - #3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dd2343b4015dad9e46f4fd8b7d391a59af165a6.jpeg)

![CTV - #4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ca297b80b2ef99d67b9086872c196720e3af315.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
